                                                                                                                    or a long term period visa (type ?D?) for stays beyond 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is issued to applicants going to Italy for Religious purposes. It is a short term period visa (type "C") for stays up to 90 days
                                                                                                                    or a long term period visa (type ?D?) for stays beyond 90 days.

## Visa Fees

[ita > moz > en > Table:Religious Purposes > Visa Fees 2]

[ita > moz > en > Table:Religious Purposes > Visa Fees 3]

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. 
IMPORTANT INFORMATION 
Please click here for a full list of documentary requirements.

## Photo Specifications
Two recent full face color photos, passport size (45 mm x 35 mm), taken against a light background
Sample Photograph: Below  specs to be maintained at 45mm x 35mm
Please provide your recent photograph (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in colour: 
- Taken against a clear white background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background;
- Clear and of good quality(as per the ticked sample but with white background);
- Printed on normal photographic paper;
- Unmounted - 45 mm x 35 mm in size;
- Full face (without sunglasses and normally without a hat or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their
                                                                                                                        religious belief or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
The processing time for Schengen visas depends on each individual case. However, applicants should always apply minimum 15 working days before
                                                                                                                    the intended journey.
Applications can be lodged earlier than six month prior to the departure date.

## Download Forms
Long Stay Application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2QG5NsmYDtPYpA3lYAkyom/b0524a25fab9acacc14d0214bf407a70/long-stay-application-form.pdf)

## Overview
The visa is issued to people who are traveling to Italy for Medical purposes. It is a short term (type "C") visa - Maximum stay: 90 days

## Visa Fees

[ita > moz > en > Table:Medical Visa > Visa Fees 1]

[ita > moz > en > Table:Medical Visa > Visa Fees 2]

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/moz/en/ita/travel-insurance)
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. 
IMPORTANT INFORMATION
Please click here for the full list of documentary requirements

## Photo Specifications
Two recent full face color photos, passport size (45 mm x 35 mm), taken against a light background
Sample Photograph: Below  specs to be maintained at 45mm x 35mm
Please provide your recent photograph (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in colour: 
- Taken against a clear white background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background;
- Clear and of good quality(as per the ticked sample but with white background);
- Printed on normal photographic paper;
- Unmounted - 45 mm x 35 mm in size;
- Full face (without sunglasses and normally without a hat or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief
                                                                                                            or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
The processing time for Schengen visas depends on each individual case. However, applicants should always apply minimum 15 working days before the intended
                                                                                                        journey.
                                                                                                    
Applications can be lodged earlier than six month prior to the departure date.

Schengen Short Stay Application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1wbWNBE1BP5dmalHuQo6Hi/48a2dfcd3381036bb621b7166a086481/schengen-short-stay-application-form.pdf)

## Overview
This Visas are subject to an Authorisation ("NULLA OSTA") issued by the competent Italian Authority ("SPORTELLO UNICO PER L'IMMIGRAZIONE") which is valid within
                                                                                6 months from the date of issuing.
This visa can be issued to foreigners invited by Italian Public Agencies, Institutions, Organizations (public/private but eligible, well known) to participate in a special public
                                                                                event (political, cultural or scientific). It is a short term period visa (type "C") -Maximum length of stay: 90 days

## Visa Fees

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/moz/en/ita/travel-insurance)
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. 
IMPORTANT INFORMATION
Please click here for a full list of documentary requirements.

## Photo Specifications
Two recent full face color photos, passport size (45 mm x 35 mm), taken against a light background
Sample Photograph: Below  specs to be maintained at 45mm x 35mm
Please provide your recent photograph (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in colour: 
- Taken against a clear white background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background;
- Clear and of good quality(as per the ticked sample but with white background);
- Printed on normal photographic paper;
- Unmounted - 45 mm x 35 mm in size;
- Full face (without sunglasses and normally without a hat or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
The processing time for Schengen visas depends on each individual case. However, applicants should always apply minimum 15 working days before the intended journey.
Applications can be lodged earlier than six month prior to the departure date.

## Photo Specifications
Two recent full face color photos, passport size (45 mm x 35 mm), taken against a light background
Sample Photograph: Below  specs to be maintained at 45mm x 35mm
Please provide your recent photograph (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in colour: 
- Taken against a clear white background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background;
- Clear and of good quality(as per the ticked sample but with white background);
- Printed on normal photographic paper;
- Unmounted - 45 mm x 35 mm in size;
- Full face (without sunglasses and normally without a hat or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
The processing time for Schengen visas depends on each individual case. However, applicants should always apply minimum 15 working days before the intended journey.
Applications can be lodged earlier than six month prior to the departure date.
